ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure (e.g., % of 16-24 year olds not in Employment, Education or Training) */,
  "measure_description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  "measure_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of measure */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., survey, administrative data) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_measure_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_type_id") REFERENCES measure_types ("measure_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measure_types" (
  "measure_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure type */,
  "measure_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure type */,
  "measure_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the measure type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity (e.g., White: All, Asian: Indian) */,
  "ethnicity_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of ethnicity */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Estimated population size of the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ethnicities_ethnicity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_type_id") REFERENCES ethnicity_types ("ethnicity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicity_types" (
  "ethnicity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity type */,
  "ethnicity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnicity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "time_period_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period (e.g., 2017-2019) */,
  "time_period_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of time period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_periods_time_period_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_type_id") REFERENCES time_period_types ("time_period_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_period_types" (
  "time_period_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period type */,
  "time_period_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time period type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographies" (
  "geography_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical region */,
  "geography_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical region (e.g., United Kingdom) */,
  "geography_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of geographical region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geography_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographies_geography_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("geography_type_id") REFERENCES geography_types ("geography_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geography_types" (
  "geography_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical type */,
  "geography_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geographical type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geography_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 16-24) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statuses" (
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "employment_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment status (e.g., All, Employed, Unemployed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., All, Male, Female) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value entry */,
  "value_name" TEXT /* Name of the value (e.g., 11.5) */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measure */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time period */,
  "geography_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographical region */,
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment status */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measure */,
  "value_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of value */,
  "upper_95_ci" REAL /* Upper 95% confidence interval of the value */,
  "lower_95_ci" REAL /* Lower 95% confidence interval of the value */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_geography_id FOREIGN KEY ("geography_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geography_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_age_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_id") REFERENCES ages ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_time_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_value_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("value_type_id") REFERENCES value_types ("value_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_employment_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_status_id") REFERENCES employment_statuses ("employment_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "value_types" (
  "value_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value type */,
  "value_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the value type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the value type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Annual Population Survey) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
